opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My groin is completely raw and burning. It itches so badly I can't stop scratching, and now it hurts too much to even walk or wear underwear.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A severe burning, itchy groin rash that now hurts to walk, worse after a strong steroid cream.

symptom_narrative.onset: scaly itchy groin rash for 3 weeks, exploded over 4 days after a strong steroid cream
symptom_narrative.character: well-defined red scaly patches with a scaly advancing edge spreading down the inner thighs; burning/itchy
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: raw, burning; hurts to walk/wear underwear
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both groin creases spreading down the inner thighs; scrotum/penis spared
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: sweating, friction, tight synthetic underwear; a strong steroid cream made it explode
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: scaly raised edges, brownish central discolouration; scrotum/penis spared; no satellite spots; no fever

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a friend's strong steroid cream (betamethasone) applied for 4 days

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: heavy labourer, sweats a lot; tight synthetic underwear

objective_data_offered.value: well-defined red scaly patches with a raised scaly advancing edge spreading ~10cm down the inner thighs; brownish central discolouration with a bit of shiny thinning; scrotum/penis spared; no satellite pustules; some moist maceration in the creases
